T4.1.verification: PlayerView-only AI boundary, persistent known-information tracking, deck-consistent deterministic hidden-slot sampling, fail-closed determinized clones, canonical versioned PlayerViewHash, hidden-identity poisoning equality, visible-identity sensitivity, WASM compile, and Android arm64 compile all pass locally.

T4.2.verification: Deterministic data-driven evaluation covers life, poison, visible board material and effective characteristics, cards, mana development, tempo, and Commander metadata. Bundled weights parse fail-closed and remain data rather than code.

T4.3.verification: Seeded random-legal, deterministic/noisy one-ply heuristic, mulligan, threat/target helpers, and exact release-profile policy/action replay pass at product 0961e94. Regenerated heuristic and random replays cover 15,763 and 6,505 canonical decisions and persist complete legal descriptors, PlayerView hashes, DecisionStateKeys, and path discriminators. The exact three-policy audit covers 38,299 decisions with 38,242 semantic signatures, matching 38,242 state keys, 190 explicitly path-bound decisions, and zero collisions or missing canonical fields. Hierarchical attacker, blocker, combat-damage order/amount, variable-number, payment, spell/activated/triggered resolution object choices, ordinary triggered-target announcements, resolution-time trigger optionals, exact event-player unless payments, and kernel-validated no-legal-target trigger dispositions preserve complete typed declarations without materializing Cartesian products; same-batch inter-trigger targeting and other unsupported choices remain fail closed.

T4.4.verification: Root-parallel determinized UCT passes the regenerated exact full-game replay at product 0961e94: 16,031 canonical decisions, 789 search-policy decisions, 1,086 simulations, and 1,629 nodes, with 18,321 typed actions and final hash 3933493530367397528. Action-edge statistics, collision-checked wide-key buckets, hierarchical combat and variable-mana path identity, typed target-family widening, canonical trigger-resolution choices, and exact state-key auditing pass focused regressions.

T4.5.verification: Product 0961e94 replaces exponential combat products with scoped per-object subcontexts, preserves split attacks and menace completion, validates combat-damage order and amount through bounded hierarchical contexts, resolves printed {X} through typed begin-cast, numeric-range, payment, and final-cast contexts, routes ordinary triggered targets, resolution-time trigger optionals, and exact event-player unless payments through the canonical decision surface, and removes required targetless triggers through a kernel-validated typed disposition. Typed partial declarations survive deeper search states and each sampled GameState is constructed once. Target variants of the same typed cast or program-bound activation are interleaved as widening families while every concrete ID, transition, edge statistic, and replay action remains distinct. Exact heuristic, random, and search replays pass; the refreshed fixed/adaptive 1-4 ms ladder measures approximately 1.5-4.9 ms p95 instead of the former 240-266 ms floor. Transpositions, progressive widening, action abstraction, and total decision time budgets are implemented; future hierarchical expansion is evidence-driven rather than an open T4.5 deliverable.

T4.6.verification: Versioned provisional tier definitions and paired seat-swapped ladder/calibration/search-knee infrastructure are implemented. The current diagnostic surface responds to 1-4 ms budgets, but no tier or Standard knee is promoted because CPU/memory telemetry, development, validation, sealed, three-archetype, acceptable-action, and Owner play evidence remain incomplete.

T4.7.verification: Tiered data-driven risk profiles apply soft action-prior penalties and fail closed on malformed positive values; search can override penalties.

T4.8.verification: No learned model training or dependency addition has been authorized.

T4.9.verification: Release desktop wall-latency percentiles and paired B/2B diagnostics are exact-product-bound; the hierarchical 1-4 ms smoke now measures approximately 1.5-4.7 ms p95. A dependency-free safe adapter records Linux/Android thread CPU from /proc/thread-self/schedstat and process RSS from /proc/self/status, while unsupported platforms emit explicit nulls. forge-ai compiles for wasm32-unknown-unknown and aarch64-linux-android. Supported Linux measurements, worker price/utilization, and physical Android/WASM reference-device latency remain pending.

T4.10.verification: LastDecisionReport exposes the selected canonical action and top three concrete alternatives with visits, mean values, value deltas, simulations, nodes, determinizations, wall time, and stop reason; focused search coverage passes.
